untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identifying a 2-month low price level and computing consolidation area visibility/boundaries as a plainly visible zone to the naked eye. These require multi-bar pattern recognition and relative price range analysis that cannot be expressed as simple indicator comparisons. The 'double the prior 2-month low' and 'plainly visible consolidation' conditions require custom pattern detection logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using Bollinger Bandwidth (tight consolidation proxy), volume ratio (receding volume proxy), and price position relative to SMA. However, the core logic of identifying the consolidation zone relative to a specific 2-month low and validating it is 'plainly visible' requires pattern recognition beyond structured indicator rules. Success rate parameters (64% bull, 23% avg rise) noted but not directly translatable. Stop loss rule marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source; used conservative 3% default. Exit condition uses SMA crossover as reversal proxy.
